allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking helps risk-assessment see interdependencies and unknown-unknowns before the downside is misread as a set of isolated variables.
Constraints help risk-assessment identify the bottlenecks and exposure limits that most shape downside behavior under pressure.
Checklists give risk-assessment a disciplined surface for thresholds, mitigations, and monitoring so key exposures are not left to memory.

antagonists.rationale_text: Optimism-bias-and-planning-fallacy undermines risk-assessment when downside scenarios are underweighted because the plan feels internally coherent and success feels conjunctively plausible.

Representativeness-bias undermines risk-assessment by causing estimators to judge likelihood based on how much a situation resembles a vivid past case rather than on distributional base rates — salient analogies displace the reference-class evidence risk assessment requires.
antagonists.source_quote: risk-assessment vs representativeness-bias: risk-assessment conflicts with representativeness-bias (representativeness bias) when salient analogies replace distributional risk estimates.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Risk-assessment conflicts with optimism-bias-and-planning-fallacy when downside scenarios are underweighted.
structured_tensions.source_quote: risk-assessment vs optimism-bias-and-planning-fallacy: risk-assessment conflicts with optimism-bias-and-planning-fallacy (optimism bias and planning fallacy) when downside scenarios are underweighted.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Risk-assessment conflicts with representativeness-bias when salient analogies replace distributional risk estimates — the vivid similarity of a situation to a past case overrides the reference-class base rates that accurate risk quantification requires.
structured_tensions.source_quote: risk-assessment vs representativeness-bias: risk-assessment conflicts with representativeness-bias (representativeness bias) when salient analogies replace distributional risk estimates.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strongest on systems, constraints, and thresholding allies plus explicit conflicts with underweighted downside imagination and representativeness-driven analogy substitution.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor risk-framework widening beyond the clearly named systems, controls, and anti-optimism neighborhood.
